mediastream.title: Transcoding / Direct Play
mediastream.description: Manage transcoding and direct play settings
mediastream.preferTranscodingHelp: If enabled, Seanime will not automatically switch to direct play if the media codec is compatible with the client.
mediastream.directPlayOnlyHelp: Only allow direct play. Transcoding will never be initiated.
mediastream.hardwareAccelerationHelp: Hardware acceleration is highly recommended for a smoother transcoding experience.
mediastream.customSettingsJsonHelp: Video stream only, scaleFilter = -vf, -map,-bufsize,-b:v,-maxrate are applied automatically.
mediastream.transcodePresetHelp: 'Fast' is recommended. VAAPI does not support presets.
mediastream.ffmpegPathHelp: Path to the FFmpeg binary. Leave empty if the binary is already in your PATH.
mediastream.ffprobePathHelp: Path to the FFprobe binary. Leave empty if the binary is already in your PATH.

torrentstream.title: Torrent Streaming
torrentstream.includeInAnimeLibraryHelp: Add non-downloaded shows that are in your 'Currently Watching' list to the library.
torrentstream.autoSelectEnableHelp: Let Seanime find the best torrent automatically.
torrentstream.preferredResolutionHelp: If auto-select is enabled, Seanime will try to find torrents with this resolution.
torrentstream.hostHelp: Leave empty for default. The host to listen for new BitTorrent uTP and TCP connections.
torrentstream.portHelp: Leave empty for default. Default is 43213.
torrentstream.slowSeedingHelp: This can help avoid issues with your network.
torrentstream.streamUrlAddressHelp: Modify the stream URL format. Leave empty for default.
torrentstream.cacheDirectoryHelp: Where torrents will be downloaded while streaming. Leave empty to use the default cache directory.
torrentstream.chooseEmptyDirectory: Choose an empty directory to avoid losing data.
torrentstream.preloadNextEpisodeHelp: Starts downloading the next episode in the background.
torrentstream.preloadNextEpisodeMoreHelp: This feature is only partially implemented. Do not rely on it working correctly.

debridService.title: Debrid Service
debridService.apiKeyHelp: API key from your debrid service.
debridService.autoDownloaderNotUsingDebrid: Auto Downloader is not using Debrid
debridService.autoDownloaderNotUsingDebridDescription: Auto Downloader is enabled but not using Debrid. Change the
debridService.debridStreamingDescription: Configure how shows are streamed from your Debrid service

torrent.title: Torrent Provider
torrent.defaultProviderHelp: Used by the search engine. Select 'None' if you don't need torrent support.

torrentClient.title: Torrent Client
torrentClient.showActiveTorrentCountHelp: Shows the number of active torrents in the sidebar. (Memory intensive)
torrentClient.tagsHelp: Comma-separated tags to apply to downloaded torrents. e.g. seanime,anime
torrentClient.categoryHelp: Category to apply to downloaded torrents.
